content.text:
[cron:bf8094ae-445a-4c38-b75a-bf3f71fd4c64 cart-recovery-process] L2.5 ABANDONED CART RECOVERY: Process abandoned carts in GHL. For eligible opted-in contacts, execute recovery sequence with strict caps: max 2 touches/contact over 72h (email/SMS), max 30 total sends/run, minimum 6h spacing between touches, immediate stop on reply/checkout/unsubscribe. Personalize by product and objection signal. Never message do-not-contact/unsubscribed/complaint-tagged contacts. Return concise report: carts processed, sends executed, recoveries triggered, stops applied.
Current time: Saturday, March 21st, 2026 — 19:03 (America/Chicago) / 2026-03-22 00:03 UTC
